name: Takano Co.,Ltd.
summary: Takano Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells office furniture, springs, exterior products, electronics-related products, and equipment for health and welfare in Japan. It provides medical and healthcare equipment, such as stretchers, wheelchairs, wheelchair cushions, walking aids, and others; exterior products that consist of awnings, parasols, and multi-utility room products; and office furniture, including swivel chairs and conference room chairs. The company also offers electromagnetic electrical components for various industrial equipment; spring and unit components, such as precision springs and spiral springs; inspection and measurement systems, such as LCD panel inspection systems, battery-related material inspection systems, and Web inspection systems; and UV laser machining and marking machines for high precision processing. In addition, it provides health foods. The company was formerly known as Takano Factory Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Takano Co.,Ltd. in 1973. Takano Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Nagano, Japan.
